heading: Penalties
label: 666a Penalties
text: Any person who shall violate any rule or regulation promulgated in accordance with this Act shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and upon conviction thereof shall be fined not more than $500 or imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , known as the Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act, which is classified generally to sections 661 to 666c–1 of this title.
